title: Fuel-Fired Service Water Heater
full_text:
8.4.5.9 Fuel-Fired Service Water Heater
Fuel-Fired Service Water Heater
1) The fuel consumption at part-load conditions, Fuelpartload, in Btu/h, of the reference fuel-fired service water heater shall be derived by applying an adjustment factor to the fuel consumption at full load: [Equation: Fuel_{partload} = Fuel_{design} \times FHeatPLC] where Fueldesign = fuel consumption at design conditions, in Btu/h, and FHeatPLC = fuel heating part-load efficiency curve determined in accordance with Sentence (2).
2) The fuel heating part-load efficiency curve, FHeatPLC, shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: FHeatPLC = a + b \times \frac{Q_{partload}}{Q_{design}} + c \times \left(\frac{Q_{partload}}{Q_{design}}\right)^{2}] where Qpartload = service water heater capacity at part-load conditions, in Btu/h, Qdesign = service water heater capacity at design conditions, in Btu/h, a = 0.021826, b = 0.977630, and c = 0.000543.

sentences.text: The fuel consumption at part-load conditions, Fuelpartload, in Btu/h, of the reference fuel-fired service water heater shall be derived by applying an adjustment factor to the fuel consumption at full load: [Equation: Fuel_{partload} = Fuel_{design} \times FHeatPLC] where Fueldesign = fuel consumption at design conditions, in Btu/h, and FHeatPLC = fuel heating part-load efficiency curve determined in accordance with Sentence (2).

The fuel heating part-load efficiency curve, FHeatPLC, shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: FHeatPLC = a + b \times \frac{Q_{partload}}{Q_{design}} + c \times \left(\frac{Q_{partload}}{Q_{design}}\right)^{2}] where Qpartload = service water heater capacity at part-load conditions, in Btu/h, Qdesign = service water heater capacity at design conditions, in Btu/h, a = 0.021826, b = 0.977630, and c = 0.000543.
